bonuses.title: The AI Prompting Masterclass
bonuses.subtitle: Get Maximum Results from Every AI Tool
bonuses.desc: Most people use AI tools like beginners — vague inputs, average outputs. This workshop teaches you the exact prompting system used to get professional-grade results every single time. No generic templates, no fluff — a deep, practical system for prompting AI for content creation specifically.
highlights: Video and visual content prompt structures
How to iterate and refine outputs like a pro
Avoid the mistakes 90% of AI users make

bonuses.title: Master Claude as Your Co-Worker
bonuses.subtitle: AI That Actually Thinks With You
bonuses.desc: Claude isn't just a chatbot — it's the most powerful AI co-worker available right now. This dedicated workshop shows you how to use Claude for content strategy, brief writing, campaign planning, image prompt creation, script writing, and much more. Treat it like a full-time team member — because it is.
highlights: Setting up Claude as a content strategy partner
Using Claude to write perfect AI image prompts
Campaign planning and content calendars with Claude
Building custom workflows for your brand content

bonuses.title: TikTok & YouTube Monetization
bonuses.subtitle: Turn Your AI Content into Passive Income
bonuses.desc: Why stop at serving brands? Learn how to build your own faceless TikTok and YouTube channels using the exact AI content you're already creating. This bonus covers account setup, content strategy, algorithm secrets, monetization requirements, and how to go from zero to earning — without ever showing your face.
highlights: Faceless channel setup on TikTok & YouTube
AI content strategy for viral organic growth
Monetization: Creator Rewards, AdSense, brand deals
Scaling from one channel to multiple revenue streams

bonuses.title: How to Get Clients — Expert Masterclass
bonuses.subtitle: Turn Your Skill into a Freelance Business
bonuses.desc: Learning the skill is step one. Getting paid for it is step two. This detailed class taught by an expert covers exactly how to land your first and future clients — from positioning yourself, to finding brands, to pricing your services, to closing deals. A complete blueprint for building a freelance AI content business.
highlights: How to position yourself as an AI content expert
Where to find ecom brands actively looking for content
Proposal writing, pricing, and package structuring
Client retention and building long-term retainers
